channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Chipotle: Free Delivery on $10+ Digital Orders
item.description: Chipotle is waiving the delivery fee on digital orders of $10 or more for a limited time. Order in the app or at chipotle.com - no code needed, open to everyone. (Limited time)

item.title: Sweetgreen: Alice Waters' Peach & Goat Cheese Salad
item.description: Limited-edition summer collab with chef Alice Waters — a seasonal peach & goat cheese salad available nationwide in-app and in stores, with 1% of proceeds donated to the Edible Schoolyard Project. (Through August 10, 2026)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — Wingstop's soccer-season fan-favorite bundle is back. (Limited time)

item.title: El Pollo Loco: 20% Off Salads & Pollo Bowls
item.guid: El Pollo Loco-20% Off Salads & Pollo Bowls-2026-07-21
item.description: Use code FIREUP20 at elpolloloco.com for 20% off salads and Pollo Bowls — healthy fire-grilled chicken you can grab at the drive-thru. (Limited time)

item.title: Subway: $5.99 Footlong in App
item.description: Enter code FL599 at checkout in the Subway app to score any Footlong sub for just $5.99. (Limited time)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal Box
item.description: Get a McDouble or McChicken, small fries, 4-pc McNuggets, and a small drink for $5, available daily in the McDonald's app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal + Free Fries
item.guid: Burger King-$5 Your Way Meal + Free Fries-2026-07-21
item.description: Get a Your Way Meal for $5 daily, plus free French fries in any size with any purchase — both available in the BK app. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Three pieces of fried chicken, three tenders, or two regular sides — any of Popeyes' Faves for just $5 through August 31. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: KFC: 12-Piece Chicken Bucket for $15
item.description: Grab a 12-piece bucket in the KFC app for just $15 — a deeply discounted feed-the-family deal available while supplies last. (Limited time)

item.title: Sonic: $7 Big Deal Meal
item.description: Sonic's $7 Big Deal Meal bundles a burger, tots or fries, and a drink — one of the best everyday drive-in values around. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic: $1.99 Menu — All Day, Every Day
item.guid: Sonic-$1.99 Menu — All Day, Every Day-2026-07-21
item.description: Sonic's refreshed $1.99 Menu features a rotating lineup of snacks, drinks, and entrée items available all day at the drive-in. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jack in the Box: 2 Tacos for $0.99
item.guid: Jack in the Box-2 Tacos for $0.99-2026-07-21
item.description: Jack in the Box's legendary late-night deal: two tacos for just $0.99, claimable in the app — available 24 hours at most locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu
item.description: IHOP's $6 Value Menu offers budget-friendly breakfast and diner plates all day — great for late-night diners. (Ongoing)

item.title: Little Caesars: Free Crazy Bread on $25+ Orders
item.guid: Little Caesars-Free Crazy Bread on $25+ Orders-2026-07-21
item.description: Use code 25CRAZY in the Little Caesars app or online to score free Crazy Bread on any order of $25 or more. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Best Deal Ever
item.description: Domino's online-exclusive $9.99 Best Deal Ever lets you build your perfect pizza at a can't-beat price — valid through July 26. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $8.99 MyBox
item.description: Pizza Hut's MyBox gets you a personal pan pizza or melt plus fries or wings for just $8.99 — a solid everyday value. (Ongoing)

item.title: Shake Shack: Any Custard for $3 — Code CUSTARDTIME
item.guid: Shake Shack-Any Custard for $3 — Code CUSTARDTIME-2026-07-21
item.description: Get any custard for $3 at Shake Shack using code CUSTARDTIME in the app, kiosk, or online through August 19 — kicked off on National Ice Cream Day. (Through August 19, 2026)

item.title: Insomnia Cookies: Free Delivery on $15+ with Code SWEETSUMMER
item.guid: Insomnia Cookies-Free Delivery on $15+ with Code SWEETSUM-2026-07-21
item.description: Get free delivery on any order of $15 or more at Insomnia Cookies using promo code SWEETSUMMER at online checkout — perfect for late-night sweet cravings. (Limited time)

item.title: Wendy's: Biggie Deals — $4, $6 & $8 Tiers
item.description: Wendy's Biggie Deals bundle fan favorites at $4, $6, and $8 price points, claimable daily in the Wendy's app. (Ongoing)
